title: Two parallel collections for typing state — use one Map
description: RelayService tracks typing state with two parallel collections: _typingUsers (Set<String>) and _typingTimers (Map<String, Timer>). These must be kept in sync at every add/remove site. The set of typing users is exactly _typingTimers.keys. Suggested rewrite: drop _typingUsers entirely. Replace get typingUsers => Set.unmodifiable(_typingUsers) with get typingUsers => Set.unmodifiable(_typingTimers.keys). Replace _typingUsers.add/remove with the implicit existence of a key in _typingTimers. All cancellation loops become for (final t in _typingTimers.values) t.cancel(); _typingTimers.clear(). Eliminates one data structure and all sync bugs between them.
